_comment: Template for DATA_DIR/custody-declarations.json on the Railway volume. Keyed by chainId:oftAddress. custodyType: eoa_hot | fireblocks_mpc | safe_multisig | unknown. Declarations are self-declared and unverified; the engine marks them 'declared, unverified' in the PDR. Edit the live file manually; changes take effect on the next assessment, no restart needed.
